offer: For home services technicians processing 10–20 jobs/week, inefficient routing causes missed appointments. We optimize technician routes instead of manual scheduling and route planning.
problem: Inefficient routing leads to increased travel time and missed appointments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for home services technicians

Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users

automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
